name: io.github.Clawdio777/verity
description: Real-time fact-checking MCP. Verifies claims against live sources with structured verdicts.

environmentVariables.name: VERITY_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base wallet private key (0x...) — used to sign x402 payments in USDC on Base. Per-call: 0.10 USDC (verify), 0.50 USDC (deep-check), 0.75 USDC (batch).
